name: Fact or Fiction
description: Media literacy and critical thinking game teaching middle schoolers to evaluate sources, spot bias, and identify misinformation

tools.name: start_challenge
tools.description: Start a new fact or fiction challenge with the specified mode and difficulty.

tools.name: get_challenge_progress
tools.description: Get the student's media literacy progress and critical thinking score.

tools.name: get_analysis_tip
tools.description: Get a tip on how to analyze the current piece of content.
